strengths: Quantified impact on KPIs and efficiency
weaknesses: No explicit forecasting/optimization tool dev experience
No mention of scheduling or fleet utilization
No direct mention of Tableau/Power BI governance or decision-support tools
improvement_bullets: Developed predictive modeling and decision-support tools using Python and SQL to analyze operational performance, directly informing scheduling adjustments and fleet utilization strategies.
Engineered complex ETL pipelines to integrate disparate data sources into a unified capacity planning dashboard, facilitating reliable 2-year to 11-day planning cycles.
Established data governance protocols for Tableau and Power BI reporting, ensuring consistent KPI tracking and compliance with operational reliability targets.
Conducted high-level time series forecasting on operational datasets to identify resource bottlenecks, providing actionable insights for long-term network capacity planning.
Collaborated with cross-functional teams to translate complex data into operational strategy, optimizing scheduling rules and improving network reliability.
cover_letter: Hiring Manager, Atlas Air, New York, NY. Dear Hiring Manager, I am excited to submit my application for the Network Planning Analyst opportunity with Atlas Air. I am interested in this opportunity because of my deep passion for optimizing complex, global logistics networks and my desire to contribute to the operational excellence of a world-class aviation leader. What interests me about working for Atlas Air is its commitment to innovation and its modern all-Boeing fleet, which inspires me because I thrive on solving complex scheduling and capacity challenges. I believe my proficiency in predictive modeling and my experience in cross-functional data strategy would make me a strong candidate for this role. During my professional career, I have approached problems by prioritizing data-driven decision support. In fact, while at Shine Masters, I developed interactive Power BI dashboards and automated workflows that reduced process bottlenecks by 25%. This work allowed me to reallocate resources toward high-impact growth areas, a skill I am eager to apply to the network performance monitoring at Atlas Air. Ultimately, I know that the Network Planning Analyst role at Atlas Air would allow me to bring my technical expertise in SQL and Python to streamline planning processes. Additionally, my role as a Data Analyst & Operations Lead at Shine Masters enabled me to develop my capacity planning and forecasting skills. I managed the end-to-end transformation of raw data into analytical models that identified high-value segments, which led to a 300% increase in customer acquisition. I am excited by the opportunity to use my background in data visualization and modeling in working on fleet utilization and operational reporting at Atlas Air. I know that my analytical mindset and technical skillset align with what it takes to succeed at the Network Planning Analyst role. I would love the opportunity to discuss the role in more detail. Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you soon. Warm regards, Justin Miller
